summary: Completed frontend testing of BotDifficultySelector component integration. All 10 tests passed (100% success rate). The new bot difficulty selection modal opens correctly when clicking 'Auction Bidding Battle (NEW!)' button, all three difficulty options work, bet buttons function correctly, and the full game flow from photo selection to tapping arena works as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented in BotDifficultySelector.jsx
BattleArena correctly receives difficulty setting from selector
Bet buttons correctly disable when user balance is insufficient
seed_data_creation: Used existing Test Battle Photo from iteration 60
context_for_next_testing_agent: BotDifficultySelector component fully tested and working. All difficulty options (Easy, Medium, Hard) selectable with correct stats displayed. Bet buttons work correctly (Free works, paid bets disabled when balance is 0). Full game flow tested: Photo selection → Bot difficulty modal → Start battle → BattleArena → Photo selection → TappingArena countdown. SelfieMatchModal on Minted Photos page was not fully tested as the test photo may not have face_detected=true (required for Selfie Verify option to appear).

tests_executed.bot_difficulty_modal_opens: PASS - Modal opens when clicking 'Auction Bidding Battle (NEW!)' button
tests_executed.easy_difficulty_selectable: PASS - Easy Bot option selectable, shows ~55% win rate, 5 taps/sec
tests_executed.medium_difficulty_selectable: PASS - Medium Bot option selectable (RECOMMENDED), shows ~50% win rate, 7 taps/sec
tests_executed.hard_difficulty_selectable: PASS - Hard Bot option selectable, shows ~40% win rate, 9 taps/sec
tests_executed.bet_buttons_work: PASS - Free bet works, paid bets correctly disabled when balance is 0
tests_executed.start_battle_works: PASS - 'Fight [Difficulty] Bot' button starts the battle
tests_executed.battle_arena_loads: PASS - BattleArena component loads with correct difficulty setting
tests_executed.photo_selection_works: PASS - Photo selection in BattleArena works correctly
tests_executed.tapping_arena_loads: PASS - TappingArena loads with countdown phase
tests_executed.user_balance_displayed: PASS - User balance (0 BL) displayed in modal
